description: A vertical graphic split into two zones. The top half is a light powder-blue panel carrying a large bold dark-blue sans-serif headline: 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens'. The bottom half is a photograph of a person's hand at a translucent holographic interface labeled 'Analytics Dashboard' and 'Business Analytics', covered in bar charts, line graphs, pie charts, and figures (for example 'Sales', 'Purchased', 'Total Earning', percentages such as 65%, 25%, 50%). Overlaid at the lower-left is a solid-blue box with white serif text 'Making America Safe Again'.
notable_text: USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens. Making America Safe Again. Analytics Dashboard.
